## What happened

A clear, one-sentence description.

1.
2.
3.

What you thought would happen.

## Actual

What actually happened. Paste any error messages or Claude's confused response.

## Environment

- Claude Code version: (run `claude --version`)
- Installed via: [ ] one-liner / [ ] manual clone
- `jq` installed: [ ] yes / [ ] no

## Which mode was running

- [ ] init (fresh project, no organizator files yet)
- [ ] update (organizator files already existed)
- [ ] hooks-only

## Additional context

Anything else. Logs, screenshots, the weather.
